scripts.dev:reset: sh -c 'ports=4321,4322,4323,5173,5174,5175,8787; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$ports -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | tr "\n" " " ); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; pids=$(lsof -tiTCP:$ports -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | tr "\n" " " ); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -9 $pids 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; exec astro dev "$@"' --
scripts.preview:worker: npm run build && cp -f .dev.vars dist/server/.dev.vars 2>/dev/null; wrangler dev --config dist/server/wrangler.json
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json
